design_concept: The Saffron Manuscript. A fusion of ancient Vedic manuscript aesthetics (parchment, deep crimsons, saffron, gold) with Swiss precision data grids. It feels like a high-end, tactile heirloom artifact rather than a generic SaaS app.

background.usage: Main application background. Represents aged parchment.

surface.usage: Card and table backgrounds. Slight contrast from the main background.

text_primary.usage: Headings and primary data. A deep, warm charcoal brown.

primary.usage: Deep Crimson. Used for primary CTAs, active tabs, SVG chart borders.

secondary.usage: Saffron. Used for highlights, accents, focus rings.

accent_gold.usage: Antique Gold. Used for subtle dividers, inner chart lines, decorative borders.

border.usage: Default borders for cards and tables.

rules.h1: font-serif text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[#8B1E0F]
rules.h2: font-serif text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-medium tracking-tight text-[#2C241B]
rules.labels: font-sans text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-[#635647] font-bold

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: The 'Control Room' grid adjusted for an artifact look. Max-width container to keep line-lengths readable.
layout_and_spacing.container: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-12

component_styles.cards: bg-[#FCFAF5] border border-[#E3D5C1] shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(44,36,27,0.04)] rounded-sm p-6 lg:p-8

buttons.primary: bg-[#8B1E0F] text-[#FCFAF5] font-sans font-semibold text-sm px-6 py-2.5 rounded-sm hover:bg-[#6A160A] transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#8B1E0F] text-[#8B1E0F] font-sans font-semibold text-sm px-6 py-2.5 rounded-sm hover:bg-[#8B1E0F]/5 transition-colors

component_styles.inputs: bg-white border border-[#E3D5C1] text-[#2C241B] rounded-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D35400] focus:border-[#D35400] font-sans text-sm p-2.5 w-full

tabs.list: border-b border-[#E3D5C1] flex gap-6 bg-transparent w-full rounded-none h-auto p-0 overflow-x-auto
tabs.trigger: font-sans text-sm font-semibold text-[#635647] py-3 px-1 border-b-2 border-transparent data-[state=active]:border-[#8B1E0F] data-[state=active]:text-[#8B1E0F] data-[state=active]:bg-transparent rounded-none transition-all whitespace-nowrap

component_styles.tables: w-full text-left border-collapse font-sans text-sm. Header: uppercase labels, text-[#635647], border-b-2 border-[#E3D5C1] pb-2. Cells: border-b border-[#E3D5C1]/50 py-3 tabular-nums.

svg_kundali_chart.wrapper: aspect-square w-full max-w-lg mx-auto relative bg-[#FCFAF5] border-4 border-double border-[#C5A059] p-2 rounded-sm shadow-inner

visual_enhancers.background_texture: Apply an absolute div covering the body with `bg-[url('https://images.pexels.com/photos/235985/pexels-photo-235985.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&dpr=2&h=650&w=940')] bg-cover opacity-[0.06] pointer-events-none mix-blend-multiply` to give the whole app a subtle parchment feel.
visual_enhancers.decorative_borders: Use CSS `double` borders (`border-double border-4`) and layered outlines (`ring-1 ring-[#C5A059] ring-offset-2 ring-offset-[#FCFAF5]`) on prominent chart wrappers to simulate traditional ornate frames.

background_image.description: High-resolution vintage parchment texture used as a global background overlay.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Cards lift by -2px with an increased warm shadow (`shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(44,36,27,0.08)]`). Buttons subtly darken.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Use `transition-all duration-300 ease-out` globally for layout shifts.
motion_and_interaction.loading: Display a stylized SVG rotating mandala or lotus icon in #D35400 instead of a standard spinner for authentic thematic alignment.

testing.data_testid_rules: Every interactive element MUST have a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case. Ensure all form fields, the calculate button, navigation tabs, and chart elements have test IDs.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install `lucide-react` for standard icons, but use them sparsely to let typography and space breathe.
The form must pre-fill with 'New Delhi', '1990-01-01', '12:00' on initial load.
For the City Autocomplete, integrate with Nominatim API. Implement debounce and show a clear loading indicator while fetching.

The North Indian Kundali chart must be built as a custom React SVG component. Use a 400x400 viewBox. Draw the outer rectangle, cross diagonals (X), and the inner diamond. Compute centroids for the 12 resulting polygons (houses) to place `<text>` tags with `text-anchor="middle"` and `dominant-baseline="middle"`.
Do NOT use pure white #FFFFFF for large backgrounds. Use the provided #FCFAF5 for surfaces and #F4F1E8 for the base background.
Override default Shadcn visual themes (radius, focus rings). Use `rounded-sm` instead of full rounded corners to match a historical, print-like aesthetic.
Inject the Google Fonts import in `index.css` and configure Tailwind's `theme.fontFamily` to map `serif` to 'Cormorant Garamond' and `sans` to 'Manrope'.
